RemediationStrings.Title: DisableWindowsConsumerFeatures (Privacy & Telemetry)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CloudContent\DisableWindowsConsumerFeatures must be 1. Severity: Low. Category: Privacy & Telemetry.

RemediationStrings.Title: NoLockScreenCamera (Privacy & Telemetry)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Personalization\NoLockScreenCamera must be 1. Severity: Low. Category: Privacy & Telemetry.

RemediationStrings.Title: NoLockScreenSlideshow (Privacy & Telemetry)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Personalization\NoLockScreenSlideshow must be 1. Severity: Low. Category: Privacy & Telemetry.

RemediationStrings.Title: AllowIndexingEncryptedStoresOrItems (Privacy & Telemetry)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Windows Search\AllowIndexingEncryptedStoresOrItems must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Privacy & Telemetry.

RemediationStrings.Title: DisableThirdPartySuggestions (Privacy & Telemetry)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKU\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CloudContent\DisableThirdPartySuggestions must be 1. Severity: Low. Category: Privacy & Telemetry.

RemediationStrings.Title: NoToastApplicationNotificationOnLockScreen (Privacy & Telemetry)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKU\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\PushNotifications\NoToastApplicationNotificationOnLockScreen must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Privacy & Telemetry.
